{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302412513E46336E679C1ECCE22"}"},"total":35},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603193409195574041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好，真挺好的，嗯，这本书中的这位主角不像别的书中的主角一样拿到系统给的技能就“硬”来着‘人前显圣’、我现在我看着作者大大写的挺自然的，而且作者大大把系统的存在感给弱化了；不是那种突然消失了，而是慢慢的淡化，或说就没刻意提起来过，除了触发时机与领奖励时，就是直接一笔带过，丝毫不拖泥带水，嗯，反而把读者们弄得都分不清了，以为他有金手指但没有系统呢，但就这样的操作、读着却是出乎意料的顺畅，嗯，再次推荐一下呀。","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":45,"text":"人前显圣","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774204885C1ECCE22%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227603193409195574041%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576542637147048984%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770260423,"group_id":"7576542637147048984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"养点动植物，看看人生书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwA+B5j+LhGS0SlfGBXZD2pwTofdthf/DR+DA3zaTn0M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/23d26dafd6554f69aaf76638ed9d3203~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796918&x-signature=awbPBzKHegWqZuY7l1SYq47ViZk%3D","user_id":"2163429140872423","user_name":"龙啸鸣天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2163429140872423","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576542637147048984","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主】+【都市】+【搞笑】+【直播】+【系统】
林凡穿越平行世界，开局抽中“万能跑腿员”，参加爆火真人秀《全职业挑战赛》。
客户1号：纯欲校花
“帅哥，能帮我查一下男朋友的岗吗？他说在宿舍开黑…”
林凡：
“推塔还是推油？抓贼抓脏，抓奸抓双！”
网友：
【我赌五毛，那男的肯定在和妹子斗地主！】
客户2号：灵异主播
“呜…我死得好惨啊……”
林凡：“姐妹，扮鬼就专业点，你这Nike鞋链接发我一个？”
网友：
【前一秒鬼哭狼嚎，下一秒博主挺潮？】
客户3号：声优女神
“电梯好黑…我好怕！”
林凡： “声音又撩又嗲，这十盒冈本单子你的？”
网友：
【这哪是幽闭恐惧，这是月老堵门啊！】
林凡：
“全网都盯着我干嘛？我就是个平平无奇的万能跑腿员，拜托！”
网友：
【信你个鬼！你这跑腿员抓得了通缉犯，修得了水管，怼得了奇葩，撩得了女神！】
